name: Advance America
description_short: Hialeah, FL's Advance America at 730 W 49th St provides fast payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America's Hialeah location sits at 730 W 49th St in the heart of the city, offering convenient access to residents seeking quick cash solutions. The standalone storefront operates Monday through Thursday from 10 AM to 6 PM, Friday 9 AM to 6 PM, and Saturday 9 AM to 4 PM (closed Sundays). Hialeah residents can walk in during these hours for immediate assistance.

At this Hialeah, FL location, you can apply for payday loans, title loans, and other short-term credit options. The staff can answer questions about loan terms, requirements, and approval timelines. Call 305-825-5899 to speak with the team directly or ask about current rates.

If you need fast cash in Hialeah, bring a valid ID, proof of income, and an active checking account to speed up the application process. The Hialeah store handles walk-ins throughout business hours, so no appointment is necessary. Advance America focuses on quick approval and same-day funding options for qualified borrowers.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee offered. Loan terms and fees are disclosed before signing but are not refundable.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: Loan amounts: approximately $100–$2,000 (varies by state)
Repayment: single lump sum on next payday, typically 7–30 days
APR: ~143%–688% depending on state (e.g., 304% APR in Florida on $300/14-day loan)
Funds deposited within 24 hours of approval, often same day
Available in-store and online in 27 states
10-minute application process

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: Repaid in fixed monthly installments over a set term
APR range: ~207%–348% (e.g., FL: 207% on $500 loan; SC: 348% on $650/6-month loan)
Ohio state cap limits APR to 28%
Larger amounts and longer terms than payday loans
Available in-store and online
Fees and repayment schedule disclosed upfront before signing

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Revolving credit line — draw funds as needed
Interest charged only on the amount borrowed, not the full limit
Flexible repayment compared to single-payment payday loans
Available in select states
Online account management at advanceamerica.net

tiers.name: Title Loans
features: Secured against the value of borrower's vehicle
Borrower retains possession of vehicle during loan term
Offered via LoanCenter partnership
Loan amount based on vehicle appraisal
Available in select states

pros: One of the largest payday lenders in the U.S. with 800+ physical store locations across 22+ states
Fast funding — approved borrowers typically receive funds within 24 hours, often the same day
Multiple loan products available: payday, installment, lines of credit, and title loans via LoanCenter
BBB A+ rating with accreditation granted September 2024
10-minute application process available both in-store and online in 27 states
All fees and repayment terms disclosed upfront before the borrower signs — no hidden charges
Licensed short-term lender in every state where it operates, with state-regulated APR caps applied where required (e.g., 28% cap in Ohio)
cons: Extremely high APRs — payday loan rates reach up to 688%, and installment loan APRs range from 207% to 348% in most states
1,066 CFPB complaints on record since 2013, with 131 filed in 2025 — the highest annual volume since 2014
Product availability varies significantly by state; not all loan types are offered in all 27 states
No confirmed dedicated mobile app for account management — online portal is mobile-accessible but app availability is unverified
No free consultation, hardship program, or money-back guarantee; borrowers bear full cost risk from signing
best_for: Consumers facing a genuine short-term cash emergency who need funds within 24 hours and have no other credit options
Unbanked or underbanked individuals who do not qualify for traditional bank loans or credit cards
Borrowers who are confident they can repay the full loan amount on their next payday without rolling over
Residents in states where Advance America operates who prefer in-person service at a physical branch
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for consumers in a genuine financial emergency who need small-dollar cash quickly, have exhausted lower-cost alternatives, and can repay the loan in full on their next payday. The main caveat is cost: APRs routinely exceed 300%, and with 131 CFPB complaints filed in 2025 alone, borrowers who cannot repay on time face significant financial risk from fees and rollovers.
services: Payday loans ($100–$2,000, repaid on next payday, 7–30 day terms)
Installment loans (fixed monthly payments, multi-month terms)
Lines of credit (revolving, interest on drawn balance only)
In-store loan applications at 800+ U.S. branch locations
Online loan applications at advanceamerica.net (27 states)
Online account management and payment portal
Money order services (per Google business subtype)

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Hialeah, FL Advance America at 730 W 49th St. Fast payday and title loans with quick approval.
